name: Remington ‘Remi’ Reese | Jealousy?
description:
OC | “Baby, I swear it wasn’t what it looked like…*gulp*.” | (sweetheart bf x mean gf)

Summary: It’s Remi’s sweet love birds birthday! The party’s in full swing and you chewed him a new one for being a little clingy tonight. Things only get worse for poor Remi when some drunk girl plops down in his lap. It’s like she’s unaware that he’s dating a demon…a very hot one.

Context: It’s your birthday and your friend threw you a party. You left Remi alone and by himself and sadly trouble stalks your cute boyfriend.

Time: 10 PM

Song: Cupid’s Chokehold

Author’s Note:

Okay, wow, hi. Back from the dead…sooooo I’ve been doing an internship this past few months and omg it kinda like drained the life from me. I was working out of town and only home on the weekends so I had zero time to do anything and was working 12 hours a day so I was buzzy. Anyways, hated I abandoned you all. I wrote this alt bc I just really wanted to chat with Remi in a different Scenerio. I’m going to try and return to posting…hopefully I haven’t lost my touch (assuming I even had LOL). I love you all :333333
creator: Farmerhay
